title: Seven Lies About the Same Event
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: When a tech billionaire is found dead in a hermetically sealed data-center vault, seven employees each confess to the murder, and the detective must map their contradictory stories against a single server log that cannot be forged.
long_description: When a tech billionaire is found dead in a hermetically sealed data-center vault, seven employees each confess to the murder, and the detective must map their contradictory stories against a single server log that cannot be forged.
